Weekly Performance Report

Summary

Generated: Apr 1, 2026 Period: Mar 25 - Mar 31 Author: System

Overall team productivity increased by 12% compared to the previous week. The Website Redesign project saw the most progress with 8 tasks completed. Mobile App v2 remains on track with steady daily commits.

Key highlights:

  • Website Redesign: 8 tasks completed, 4 in review
  • Mobile App v2: 5 tasks completed, 2 blocked
  • API Integration: Project kickoff scheduled for next week
  • Security Audit: 3 critical findings addressed

Note: This report excludes data from archived projects. To include archived project data, update your reporting preferences in the admin panel. Contact support@taskflow.com if you need assistance with custom report configuration.
